message:
refactor(scheduler): centralize per-worker local state in ThreeLaneScheduler

Move per-worker local schedulers, local-ready queues, and parkers from
being created ad-hoc in worker construction to being tracked centrally
in the ThreeLaneScheduler struct. This enables the scheduler to route
pinned local tasks and perform targeted worker wakeups from any context,
not just within a worker's own thread.

Changes:
- Add local_schedulers, local_ready, and parkers fields to
  ThreeLaneScheduler for centralized access
- Create local_ready queues upfront and share Arc clones with workers
  instead of each worker creating its own
- Add ScopedWorkerId helper struct for spawn_local tests to set the
  current worker ID in scoped context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
